category_sources: Official GitHub repository describes vt-cli as the VirusTotal command line interface.
source_facts.description says virustotal-cli is a command-line interface for VirusTotal.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository title is VirusTotal Command Line Interface.
source_facts.description expands the purpose as a VirusTotal command-line interface.
docs_sources: No dedicated docs URL is supplied in source_facts, so the official README is the best documentation surface.
source_facts.homepage points to the official VirusTotal GitHub repository.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/VirusTotal/vt-cli, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: VirusTotal is a malware and threat-intelligence scanning service, and vt-cli is its official CLI.
